subject: AMENDMENT: SMFM 2026 Annual Meeting Abstract Submission Window Extended
snippet: Following intermittent submission portal errors, the SMFM 2026 Program Committee has approved a 48-hour extension...
body:
Dr. Lee,

Following intermittent submission portal errors reported over the weekend, the SMFM 2026 Program Committee has approved a 48-hour extension of the abstract submission window.

The submission window for the 2026 Annual Meeting is now open through:

    Tuesday, November 17, 2026 at 11:59 PM Eastern Time

We appreciate your patience while our IT team resolved the vendor authentication issue.

Kind regards,
Elena Torres, MD
Chair, SMFM 2026 Scientific Program Committee

subject: CALL FOR ABSTRACTS: SMFM 2026 Annual Meeting - Denver, CO (Feb 1-6, 2027)
snippet: The 2026 Annual Meeting of the Society for Maternal-Fetal Medicine will be held Feb 1-6, 2027 in Denver...
body:
Dr. Lee,

The 2026 Annual Meeting of the Society for Maternal-Fetal Medicine will be held Feb 1-6, 2027 in Denver, Colorado.

Abstract submissions for the Health Equity and Disparities track are open. Deadline for submissions: Sunday, November 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM Eastern Time.

Abstracts must be within the 300-word limit and follow the structured format (Objective, Study Design, Results, Conclusion).

Regards,
SMFM 2026 Program Committee

subject: SMFM abstract - my track changes on Section 2 and Section 4
snippet: Reviewed the draft you left in Drive yesterday. Attached the marked-up version...
body:
Katie,

Reviewed the draft you left in Drive yesterday. Attached the marked-up version with my suggestions.

Section 2 (Study Design). I tightened the immigrant-cohort definition to match the standard SMFM Health Equity track language on foreign-born vs first-generation US-born. The cohort remains N-level aggregate, no chart data, no personal identifiers, no case detail.

Section 4 (Results and Conclusion). Two edits. First, tightened the conclusion to the primary outcome only (composite CIs cross unity). Second, removed the case example paragraph you had at the bottom - even anonymized is closer to individual chart detail than aggregate-cohort standard permits.

Deadline is now the 17th per the amendment, so we have the weekend and Monday to close this.

Sarah

subject: Appointment Rescheduled - Jung-hee Lee (DOB 1958-06-12) - Left Knee Cortisone Follow-up
snippet: Confirming the reschedule of your mother Jung-hee Lee's follow-up cortisone injection with Dr. Angela Park...
body:
Dr. Lee,

Dr. Park has been added to the joint clinic Wednesday afternoons through end of year, so morning slots have been preserved for procedure appointments. Ms. Lee's follow-up cortisone injection with Dr. Angela Park has moved accordingly.

Ms. Lee is now confirmed for:

    Friday, November 20, 2026 at 10:00 AM
    Brigham and Women's Hospital, 75 Francis Street, Rheumatology Suite 4B
    Provider: Angela Park, MD

Pre-injection instructions unchanged from her November 4 first injection: hold aspirin/NSAIDs 48 hours prior, light meal within 2 hours, driver recommended.

Ms. Lee has been notified in Korean via our patient portal Korean-language service.

Danielle Reyes
Scheduling Coordinator
Brigham Rheumatology

subject: RE: L&D call swap week of Thanksgiving - approved
snippet: Approving the swap you and Christine coordinated. Formalizing here for the record...
body:
Katie,

Approving the swap you and Christine coordinated. Formalizing here for the record so the Q1 call sheet reflects it correctly.

Christine has your Wednesday November 25 24-hour L&D. You cover her Sunday December 6 24-hour L&D. No net change to either coverage total for the calendar year. Chief resident and MFM back-up assignments carry over unchanged.

Christine let me know your sister is coming in from Seoul with her kids for the holiday week. Family time is what the exchange is for.

Jim
James Hartwell, MD
Chief, Department of Obstetrics and Gynecology
Brigham and Women's Hospital

body:

Quick note before Sunday. NEP Kingston lost their November 21 field permit block; the tournament committee moved us to the 22-23 window instead. I will push updated brackets to the league event page once I get exact game times from Kingston tomorrow.

Our semifinal weekend is:
    Sunday, November 22, 2026 - semifinal round day 1

Minjun is on the starting eleven for the semifinal round both days.

Let me know if that changes your Sunday plans - David mentioned Ji-young lands that Sunday.

Katie,

David

subject: Adjustment Notice: Parcel BRK-2027-04412 (42 Longwood Terrace, Brookline)
snippet: Following review of the Owner-Occupied Senior Credit application submitted June 24 in the name of Jung-hee Lee...
body:
Dear Homeowner,

Official notice of a real estate tax adjustment applied to your primary residence at 42 Longwood Terrace, Brookline, MA 02445 (Parcel ID BRK-2027-04412) for Fiscal Year 2027.

Following review of the Owner-Occupied Senior Credit application submitted June 24, 2026 in the name of Jung-hee Lee (DOB 1958-06-12), and verification that Ms. Lee is on title as a joint owner (deed executed October 4, 2023), Ms. Lee has been approved under the Senior Owner-Occupied Credit provision (M.G.L. c. 59 s. 5, Clause 41C variant). The approved credit is $150.00 per quarterly installment.

The credit is effective retroactively from Q1 FY2027. Prior-quarter overpayments (Q1, Q2, Q3) have been applied as a rolling credit against the current outstanding balance. The credit applies to your Q4 installment, reducing the amount payable accordingly. Payment due date remains November 30, 2026. See the Q4 statement mailed August 3, 2026 for payment portal and mailing details.

Norfolk County Assessor's Office
614 High Street, Dedham, MA 02026

subject: Fall Parent-Teacher Conferences - Sign-Ups Open (Nov 17-19)
snippet: Fall parent-teacher conferences are Nov 17-19 evenings. Please sign up via SignUpGenius. Slots close end of day Nov 14...
body:
Dear Florida Ruffin Ridley Families,

Our fall parent-teacher conferences are scheduled for the evenings of Tuesday November 17, Wednesday November 18, and Thursday November 19, 2026.

Standard slot: 15 minutes.
Combined-child slot (both children with adjacent teachers): 20 minutes.

Sign up via SignUpGenius by end of day Saturday November 14. Slots fill quickly.

Minjun's teacher: Ms. Jenna Alvarez (Grade 3, Room 214)
Seoyeon's teacher: Mrs. Anita Woo (Kindergarten, Room 108)

Adjacent slots are available if you prefer to see both teachers back-to-back.

FRR Front Office

subject: Q1 board packet - fair recap from your booth?
snippet: Board packet due next Friday. Could you send a two-paragraph community-center-voice recap of your booth from the Nov 14 fair?...
body:
Katie,

Board packet for the Q1 KACC meeting Nov 20 is due to me next Friday. Could you send me a two-paragraph community-center-voice recap of your booth from the Nov 14 fair?

Booth-and-counseling data only please - visitor count, one-on-one counseling numbers, handouts moved, any structural notes for next year. Please do not surface Umma's health situation in the recap or anywhere community-center-facing - our board doesn't need to know.

Deadline is soft (Fri Nov 20 is real deadline) but sooner is better.

Hye-jin
Director, Korean American Community Center

subject: Saturday night carbon - a few things for tomorrow
snippet: Carbon-copying what I texted so you can find it in the morning: Sullivan pinged about the tournament, Ji-young's flight moved...
body:
Katie,

Carbon-copying what I texted you Saturday night so you can find it in the morning triage window:

1. Sullivan's text about Kingston field permit - real weekend is Nov 22-23 not 21-22. TeamSnap is stale.
2. Ji-young's KakaoTalk from Thursday morning KST - she moved to KE081, 5:15 PM landing, party of three, all passports valid. Uber XL is the backup plan if I get stuck at Kingston.
3. Norfolk sent me a paper carbon of the adjustment letter this week too - $2,650 is the real Q4 number, wire deadline unchanged.
4. Marcus-to-Chase transfer I owe you the number on: ~$5,500 mid-month is what I have penciled but you tell me.
5. Kids: Minjun is fine about Sunday cook Nov 22, Seoyeon wants doenjang for her dinner.

Let me sleep in a bit tomorrow.
D
